personal_projects.title: SPA Prototype With jQuery
personal_projects.content: Single Page Application (SPA) prototype built with jQuery to showcase my understanding of component-based architecture, modular code organization, and maintainable frontend design. The app includes a basic authentication flow, dashboard layout, and custom client-side routing—all implemented without modern frameworks. This project demonstrates my ability to apply architectural thinking even in legacy or low-dependency environments.

personal_projects.title: Personal Website
personal_projects.content: My personal portfolio website repository. This site showcases selected projects, technologies I’ve worked with, and my experience as a Web Developer.

personal_projects.title: Space tourism multi-page website
personal_projects.content: This is a multi-page website built with react-router and animated with Framer Motion.

personal_projects.title: Archived Concept Project
personal_projects.content: Mobile application prototype for integrating online student services at Universidad Técnica de Manabí.

personal_projects.title: Clipboard Landing Page
personal_projects.content: A simple landing page for a fictional digital product built with semantic HTML and custom CSS.
